name: tailwind-standard
description: RMP's token-discipline styling standard for any Tailwind v4 repo, with an optional shadcn-primitive layer that auto-activates when shadcn is detected. The SessionStart pointer is gated on Tailwind (the shadcn paragraph is conditional); an on-demand skill holds the full guide; a non-blocking PreToolUse hook lints styling at write time (the radix-import check only when shadcn is present).
